summary: Successfully verified the iOS Safari 'Create Partner' button fix on White Label Partners page. Both bugs reported are confirmed fixed: (1) handleSave validation now shows alert when name/slug empty instead of silently returning, (2) The save button is now a native HTML <button> element on web platform instead of TouchableOpacity, fixing iOS Safari click issues.
critical_code_review_comments: Lines 36-40 in white-label.tsx: handleSave now calls showSimpleAlert('Missing Fields', ...) when name/slug are empty - VERIFIED WORKING
Lines 217-248 in white-label.tsx: Platform.OS === 'web' conditional correctly renders native <button> element instead of TouchableOpacity - VERIFIED WORKING
The button has proper iOS Safari compatibility props: WebkitAppearance, WebkitTapHighlightColor, touchAction
data-testid='save-partner-btn' attribute present on both native button and TouchableOpacity versions for testing
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Partner_iOS_Fix and TEST_iOS_Fix_Partner_* during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The iOS Safari Create Partner button fix has been verified. The bug was twofold: (1) silent validation failure (no user feedback when required fields empty), and (2) TouchableOpacity not responding to clicks on iOS Safari. Both issues are fixed. The form flow is: navigate to /admin/white-label -> click + icon in top right -> fill Partner Name and URL Slug (REQUIRED) -> scroll down -> click gold 'Create Partner' button. Validation shows alert for empty required fields.

backend_api.POST /api/admin/partners: PASS - Creates partner with all fields correctly
backend_api.DELETE /api/admin/partners/{id}: PASS - Deletes partner and returns 404 on subsequent GET

frontend_ui.Form fields display correctly: PASS - Partner Name, URL Slug, Legal Name, Phone, Email, Website, Address, Powered By Text, Commission Structure, Sold Workflow toggle, Brand Colors
frontend_ui.Create Partner button visible after scro: PASS - Gold button at bottom of form
frontend_ui.Create Partner button clickable: PASS - Native HTML <button> element responds to clicks
frontend_ui.Validation alert for empty required fiel: PASS - Shows 'Missing Fields - Partner Name and URL Slug are required.'
frontend_ui.Partner creation with valid data: PASS - Form closes, partner appears in list

ios_safari_button_click.issue: TouchableOpacity not responding to clicks on iOS Safari
ios_safari_button_click.fix: Replaced with native HTML <button> element on web platform (Platform.OS === 'web')

silent_validation_failure.issue: handleSave silently returned when name/slug empty with no user feedback
silent_validation_failure.fix: Added showSimpleAlert('Missing Fields', 'Partner Name and URL Slug are required.') call
silent_validation_failure.status: VERIFIED WORKING - Alert captured: 'Missing Fields - Partner Name and URL Slug are required.'
